payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: We have casual prison Percival in his true Whitestone, pale-ass self. We got Drez Vina, we got a temple keeper who was working for Lady Kima in Westruun. We have Realmseer Eskil Ryndarien, who you saw a few times throughout the first campaign, as well as Nala the dryad, who you got to meet-- the nymph that you got to meet later in the campaign. You get to see her first interaction with Grog. A couple other fun characters that you'll get to see throughout the story. Anyway, really excited about that. More information will become available as it does, but hopefully you guys get to enjoy it next year. [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Some of these characters you may have seen in our pre-stream recap video from years ago. You also get to see-- I think some of these cast hasn't seen them until tonight now. We've got Abjurist Noja, we've got Wilhand Trickfoot up there, we got Pike when her hair was still dark, before her first death.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Stonejaw Strongjaw!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: (snarls) Big, big grin. The rest of the crew, who has known you for three days, goes like, "Huh." They start getting the ropes ready, start pulling the anchor up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Jesus. Do you think you can accommodate seven of us on your two craft?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Do you not have a ship of yourself?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do we?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, we have this boat.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We have a rowboat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have a rowboat.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We have a rowboat. [laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We will accompany you to The Squalleater.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Then come, please." She immediately starts to climb down with the help of Bouldergut the ogre. Down into one boat, the helper that she was with goes down with her, and there are now the two rowboats and the rowboat that you have at your disposal. It looks like the ogre is staying onboard to help whoever's behind take The Mistake to shore.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll turn to the rest of the crew and be like, just do whatever, she-- he?-- she says.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "I'm glad you took care of them. That gets real bad as far as the food stores down here in the cargo hold. Thank you for that."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. As we go up topside, I say quietly to Nott: You know, I did not allow for Gallan to go inside the bubble, so it's all the same to him, let's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, let's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Great, perfect. Have fun wherever you're going."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh yeah, you'll be fine down here. We'll send word soon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You said something about pirates?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (clears throat) No. High rats. There were rats on the top of the mast and we took care of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a deception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No good at these.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He goes, "Oh, I mean, I hate fucking rats."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

payload.trigger_phrase: You make your way to the top
payload.raw_text: As you guys are climbing, you see The Mistake is now being led over towards shore. You make your way to the top of the deck, and as you come across, one by one, you see there waiting for you is about ten figures, all in various scattered bits of seafaring attire, leathers and billowing cloths that seem to have seen many a journey out here on the open Lucidian Ocean. Immediately, your attention is grabbed by the central figure, a female elf, with light brown skin, with red, wild hair that falls in clustered strings around her face and down the back. You see she's wearing a long, sleeveless gray coat with a high collar that bends at the edge of the shoulders, with a thick scarf around her neck. You see she has heavy elbow-length gloves and knee-high boots that look weathered with use and probably brutality. They are stained in places where that could only have been acquired by meeting the face of somebody else. As you step up, she has her arms crossed in front of her, cocks her head to the side and looks to you specifically and goes, (french accent) "Well hello, Captain. You have returned from your journey, Jawgrasp?"

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: No, that's not right at all.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Okay.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: All right.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: You'll go first, Fjord?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Sure. Yep, I mean, yes.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "I must commend you, it has been a very long time since someone has been so bold with such massive balls to come onto my ship. And I think that perhaps I got where I am today not by seeing through a few paltry illusions."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She turns back to you and begins to walk a circle around you, arms behind her back now. Folded. "Jawgrasp, so you come to me with a new crew, and you tell me that you are successful but yet you are not. Describe to me what transpired to prevent you from acquiring this thing you have paid for."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well you see, we now know the location of the artifact you seek. It's as good as ours.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "How did this terrible, terrible thing happen to you?" She reaches up and touches the side of your neck.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh god.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Her hand passes through--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's real sore.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: --the illusion, and she steps back and goes... [groaning]

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Shit, shit, shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All part of the plan.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Very well. Well, since you've been so forthright, Tracy, Phillip, Sapphire, Cornelius, Janet, and Gilli-gone?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Have them trained on the lot of you. The captain still now has her hands crossed in front of you and goes, "Well, I guess now that we are out in the open, who the fuck are you and how did you come in the possession of The Mist?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That is a wonderful story. One that I would love to share. You have the honor of being in the company of The Mighty Nein. [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "But there are only seven of you." [laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's a long story, but I'm afraid we won't be able to tell it or further converse unless we have an atmosphere of equal exchange here, and this hostile act is not a step in the right direction, Captain.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "So you are the captain of that ship. Are you suggesting that we parlay?" [laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Say yes, Fjord. Say yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's noticeably lower. In maybe a short ten minute period, it'll be finding its way onto the beach.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "So you are the captain of that ship. Are you suggesting that we parlay?" [laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Say yes, Fjord. Say yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Very well. Well, since you've been so forthright, Tracy, Phillip, Sapphire, Cornelius, Janet, and Gilli-gone?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Gilli-gone? Hon hon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Welcome aboard the Squalleater. I am Captain Avantika. Now, the fact that you are here, that you've made your way across the reef, that you managed to best our sister ship and the crew on board, which I assume have all been dispatched?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Indeed.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Just out of curiosity, if I look back over my shoulder, do I still see a boat?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, yeah! [laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You do, you do. [cheering]

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "To spend a few days across the jungles of the island to see what there is to be found there. You see, this object, this sphere, it needs to return. There is a temple in there that is from long ago, and has been since refitted by its current denizens. Something at the very bottom of that temple requires to be reunioned, reunited with this thing I seek. So--"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Perhaps. [laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's looking right into you, lids half-closed, this dagger stare of trying to read any sort of give.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Captain, I hope you understand that this is not my first rodeo. If I were to tell you everything that I know right now, why would you need me alive?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Very well, let's trade a bit. The object I have not seen before, but I know of it and am hoping to bring it to this island for a purpose. I had recently hired an individual known as Jamedi Cosko, a very well-established adventurer, delver of dungeons. Cosko is a--" Not Costco. [laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's what I heard.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's what I heard, too.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: C-O-S-K-O, Cosko.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Great pizza place.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you can get your crew in bulk.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, no, no, take it easy!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Your reactions are killing me, Travis. "Shortly after the Calamity washed this land clean and Zehir, the Cloaked Serpent god, was banished long away, one of his greatest creations was left to rule this ocean: Uk'otoa."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I thought that was a metaphor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That was a triple-aged Gouda!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, but really, what did you say? What was the name?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Uk'otoa. Spelled U-K apostrophe O-T-O-A. "Uk'otoa, the great leviathan."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Gate of the leviathan?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The great leviathan."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, the great leviathan!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do you know what that means?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have a good sense of it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's a fucking leviathan!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't know what the fuck that means!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's in your book!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Her eyes are trained on Fjord as she says this. "Well, you see, I am the chosen of Uk'otoa." She pulls the scarf down from under her neck, and in the sternum, there is a tattoo of an eye. (gasping) [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, what tattoo was it? You're Uk'otoa?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, she is the chosen of--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You're the chosen of Uk'o-- sorry. The sound--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You see, this great serpent once ruled the Lucidian Ocean."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (high-pitched) Serpent?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Right, okay. I'll allow it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it'll be like a white noise machine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can we create white noise?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, white noise.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yasha can fall asleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It prevents creatures from entering and exiting, outside of the ones that you choose, but it does not shift, alter, or stop any sound passage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I would--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That means everyone heard Beau and Keg bone, is what you're saying. [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, if--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, you were upstairs, so only if you're screamers.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, some of us actually saw it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's a good night.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No shame.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No shame. No regrets.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can Caduceus and I use our Thaumaturgy to make ominous whispers all around us so that it's like white noise so that we can whisper inside?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's what we do. Constantly. We'll trade off so it's like--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (whispering) Krakatoa. Krakatoa.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All my whispers are just saying that in different pitches.

payload.trigger_phrase: you make your way to the captain
payload.raw_text: There you go. While that's happening, Fjord, you make your way to the captain's quarters.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: You are a walking hazard right now.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: I just had the itch.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: No, look, I'm not shaming you for that. I'm just saying maybe we should put the black powder in the haversack.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Oh, good idea.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Oh yeah, give it to me, that's smart. [laughter]

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: She leans her shoulder against the doorway, looking over at your eyes, distantly reaching for memories, and goes, "There has been one other. It's been many years. This came to me through a series of unexpected--" You see her searching for the right words and says, "I've always considered myself a very lucky person. At first I thought this was a terrible portent, when this beautiful Uk'otoa spoke to me. It was a purpose that nobody else in Darktow was going on, and with that I began to gather my crew. It took a while, but each of them began to believe as well. All of them support, and when this is done, the blessing is high. Nay, he is unstoppable behind me as I am on the sea."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Before this goes any further, because I'm fascinated--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I would like to attempt to go into Frumpkin, the one-ounce elf owl, if possible.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep. Frumpkin is still up on the deck.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I remember where that room was, so Frumpkin is taking a little fly around.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (owl hooting)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's better when somebody's watching.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Frumpkin goes and perches on the outer balcony of the Squalleater.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Captain, I admit, I too am very encouraged to find someone that seems to have gone through the same sort of visions and trials that I have. You said it's been a long time since you've met another chosen. Are you saying you've met previous? I found myself feeling I was the only one that was experiencing this vision.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (coughing) I thought you were going to say something else.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Thank you for your honesty, eventually." [laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: My god, the sea. [laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What does the eye say to you? Anything you remember?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Tells me to, to watch, to learn."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (grunting)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: To consume?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "To consume." [cheering and laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, Matt and Travis are going to make out. [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's just so much, you guys, it's just so much.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Details.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What is happening?!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I confess, having spent so much time on the water, the command over it seems like too great a gift to receive, but I crave it. [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She steps around the desk.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, fuck. [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Just places her fingers on the hilt of the sword, where the eye is. "Then you'll need your rest."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Indeed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: M'lady.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We will all. [laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I will put my hand on hers and say  We will all need our rest for the trials to come. Thank you for sharing your story with me, I don't feel quite as alone in this.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. You watch as she takes her glove and puts it back on, looking at her palm as she does. Looks out over the ocean and steps out to the railing, where she has to move away to get out of the visual perspective, and spends a minute or so looking over the water. Then turns back, goes and closes the door, walks over to underneath the main doorway, where that shrine is. She pulls a stool up to stand up to about eye level to where the shrine is. Then she pulls her glove off once more, makes a small cut on her finger, and drops a few pieces of blood onto the small iron shrine. It's maybe about that big and then puts the glove back on, mumbles a few words beneath her breath, though Frumpkin might not able to see from this perspective. Then goes ahead and snuffs the candles.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ew!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I know. So she showed me hers and I showed her mine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Eyes! Our eyes! On the sword.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Did you tell her the orb was inside of you?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I did not.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, I'm assuming, if she's got the eyeball on her hand, she has an orb inside of her, Fjord?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I didn't even think of that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean it's got to be, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Question. I am still watching her. [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What the fuck do you mean "still"? [cheering]

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I know it's confusing; I like to stay inside this Zemnian accent so much, but I did not say that out loud. That was for the DM.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Question, Caleb?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I did not stop watching her after he left.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What is she doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Roll well.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Just a ten.

payload.raw_text: Continuing to ascend these steps one by one, they grow more and more narrow. You think you see an approaching surface of some kind. You're clear of the water, suddenly breaking the surface and you're standing in a dark stone chamber. You've managed to get all the way up standing within the ankle high water in the middle of the stone chamber and you watch, as all the liquid begins to drain. Until there's no more water around you. Revealing in the center of this chamber, an intricate circle in the ground, maybe two feet across. Beautiful ancient craftsmanship, detailed to depict a serpent body coiled. Carved eyes emerging from the creature's body every few inches. The center of the water is a circle of water, like a well. "Watching." What do you do?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Witch Bolt, right to its chest.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: As the darkened energy arcs from the hilt of your blade, hitting it you watch as the cracks spider up the stone before it detonates into hundreds of shards of dark stone. You see half of the face slowly hit and clatter onto the stone before falling off to the side. Vandren. Do you continue up?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: The stairs, are they staying the same, is there anything at the foot of the statue after they break apart?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Looking down the statue itself is now immaterial. You've entirely annihilated it and you glance over the side, and what few shards still remain, slowly drift beyond your view into the dark abyss below.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: I'll move forward.

payload.raw_text: "Reward." And you wake up. [applause]

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: You watch as the ocean fires up like a spire, a pillar of solid ocean water. The ships are scattered in different directions, as it slams them down once more, scattering them into thousands of pieces of splintered wood.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Can I take both hands and do a coup de grace, two big (crashing) over the top?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: The center of the ocean parts, giving this slight vacuum. This dual-sided, abyssal crevice in the center of the ocean. On the opposite ends of where your hands rise, you watch the waves rise up and in one fell sweep, two solid crystalline walls of water slam together and then even out. As the ripples subside, all you can see are the thousands and thousands of glittering shards of what once were that armada.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns_last5.text: Moses shit.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Don't wake up, don't wake up.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Reward." And you wake up. [applause]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You watch as the ocean fires up like a spire, a pillar of solid ocean water. The ships are scattered in different directions, as it slams them down once more, scattering them into thousands of pieces of splintered wood.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I take both hands and do a coup de grace, two big (crashing) over the top?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The center of the ocean parts, giving this slight vacuum. This dual-sided, abyssal crevice in the center of the ocean. On the opposite ends of where your hands rise, you watch the waves rise up and in one fell sweep, two solid crystalline walls of water slam together and then even out. As the ripples subside, all you can see are the thousands and thousands of glittering shards of what once were that armada.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Moses shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Don't wake up, don't wake up.

payload.raw_text: As the rest of you come to consciousness in the morning, Fjord seems to be sleeping in a little bit before suddenly shooting up with a gasp.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: "Reward." And you wake up. [applause]

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Wow, another dream with seamen scattered everywhere. [laughter]

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: It's somehow worse with that outfit.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: (laughing) Yes!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: That's my people.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As the rest of you come to consciousness in the morning, Fjord seems to be sleeping in a little bit before suddenly shooting up with a gasp.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I take both hands and do a coup de grace, two big (crashing) over the top?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The center of the ocean parts, giving this slight vacuum. This dual-sided, abyssal crevice in the center of the ocean. On the opposite ends of where your hands rise, you watch the waves rise up and in one fell sweep, two solid crystalline walls of water slam together and then even out. As the ripples subside, all you can see are the thousands and thousands of glittering shards of what once were that armada.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Moses shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Don't wake up, don't wake up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Reward." And you wake up. [applause]

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow, another dream with seamen scattered everywhere. [laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's somehow worse with that outfit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughing) Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's my people.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, you guys have made it to the deck. It's early morning. The sun's only really been up maybe an hour or so. There's still a mist across the ocean and you can see the distance where the reefs encapsulate the surrounding area of this island. The mist is so heavy that you cannot see beyond other than a few other signs that you recall when you first passed through that reef. Looking off the way of the shore, you can see that The Mistake is currently grounded and looks like there's a small crew trying to do repairs. You're not quite sure to what extent and how long it'll take, but the ship seems to be at least the time being out of commission.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Speaking as a massive liar, I think he is lying to us a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Look, we can know, just like I know about your shit, we can know about Fjord's shit, and we can just keep that on the down low, right? I'm interested in knowing about people's shit, not exposing it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure. One eye open.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: One eye open.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't think he knows what he wants yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, and you think you do? You the authority on knowing what other people want?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm the authority on knowing what I want, Beauregard.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Me neither. [laughter]

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: He spoke with a different accent for a split second.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We've heard Fjord speak with a lot of different accents.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, to a purpose, not when he is waking up instantly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He clearly had some sort of fucking dream. We know that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He'll tell us when he wants to tell us, all right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I walk upstairs.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "I was about to give you that before you so rudely interrupted me first thing in the morning."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oui.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That is correct. It is a pleasure to meet you as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I will tell you it is very dangerous. Bring what you think is necessary. The island itself is indeed cursed for the creatures that call it home."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, if you've explored it, why don't you tell us what's necessary to bring?
